title: Small robots help farmers check crops
description: Engineers have tested small robots that move between farm rows and photograph crops. Software checks the images for signs of disease and dry soil. Farmers can use the reports to respond earlier.
text: Engineers have tested small robots that move between farm rows and photograph crops. Software checks the images for signs of disease and dry soil. Farmers can use the reports to respond earlier.
